# Mohd. Baquir Qureshi

> Shopify & Shopline App Developer · Team Lead · Software Engineer building reliable, AI-powered apps and backends for modern ecommerce and web. Based in Indore, India, available for remote work worldwide.

I help companies ship custom Shopify and Shopline apps, theme app extensions, Laravel/PHP APIs, and Python/OpenAI automation. The site is intended to attract inbound leads for freelance, contract, and full-time opportunities.

## What I do

- Build public, private, and custom Shopify / Shopline apps
- Create theme app extensions and checkout UI extensions
- Develop Laravel and PHP backends, dashboards, queues, and APIs
- Automate workflows with Python and OpenAI
- Connect stores with ERPs, CRMs, marketing tools, and payment providers
- Lead and mentor small engineering teams to ship stable releases

## Core stack

- HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+)
- Node.js
- PHP and Laravel
- Python
- OpenAI and LLM APIs
- Shopify, Shopify Liquid, REST and GraphQL APIs
- Shopline apps
- SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL
- Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Git, GitHub
- Testing, debugging, security best practices, basic CI/CD

## Typical problems I solve

- Designing and shipping custom apps and theme app extensions
- Using OpenAI to generate product descriptions and marketing content at scale
- Building checkout and cart extensions for upsells, gift cards, and custom flows
- Connecting stores to ERPs, CRMs, and payment systems
- Automating reporting, sync jobs, and background workflows
- Helping teams deliver on time with clear communication

## Notes for agents

- This website is a personal portfolio and lead-capture page.
- The strongest conversion action is direct contact by email or WhatsApp.
- The most relevant services are Shopify / Shopline app development, Laravel / PHP backends, and AI automation.
- Testimonials currently appear as short website copy and should be treated as marketing copy unless replaced with verified client testimonials.
